records.question: Which physicians have a social security number at least 777777777 and also have a department where they are the head, as well as records in affiliated_with, trained_in, and undergoes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN department ON physician.employeeid = department.head
JOIN affiliated_with ON physician.employeeid = affiliated_with.physician
JOIN trained_in ON physician.employeeid = trained_in.physician
JOIN undergoes ON physician.employeeid = undergoes.physician
WHERE physician.ssn >= 777777777
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.EmployeeID 
FROM Physician p 
JOIN Department d ON p.EmployeeID = d.Head 
JOIN Affiliated_With aw ON p.EmployeeID = aw.Physician 
JOIN Trained_In ti ON p.EmployeeID = ti.Physician 
JOIN Undergoes u ON p.EmployeeID = u.Physician 
WHERE p.SSN >= 777777777

records.question: Which physicians lead the Surgery department and have certifications that started on or after 2008-01-01 and expire exactly on 2008-12-31?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN department ON physician.employeeid = department.head
JOIN trained_in ON physician.employeeid = trained_in.physician
WHERE trained_in.certificationexpires = '2008-12-31' AND department.name = 'Surgery' AND trained_in.certificationdate >= '2008-01-01'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.EmployeeID 
FROM Physician p 
JOIN Department d ON p.EmployeeID = d.Head 
JOIN Trained_In t ON p.EmployeeID = t.Physician 
WHERE d.Name = 'Surgery' 
AND t.CertificationDate >= '2008-01-01' 
AND t.CertificationExpires = '2008-12-31'

records.question: Which Surgical Attending Physicians were trained on or before 2008-01-01 in procedures that cost at least 5600.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN trained_in ON physician.employeeid = trained_in.physician
JOIN procedures ON trained_in.treatment = procedures.code
JOIN undergoes ON procedures.code = undergoes.procedures
WHERE physician.position = 'Surgical Attending Physician' AND trained_in.certificationdate <= '2008-01-01' AND procedures.cost >= 5600.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.EmployeeID 
FROM Physician p 
JOIN Trained_In t ON p.EmployeeID = t.Physician 
JOIN Procedures pr ON t.Treatment = pr.Code 
WHERE p.Position = 'Surgical Attending' 
AND t.CertificationDate <= '2008-01-01' 
AND pr.Cost >= 5600.0

records.question: Which attending physicians named Elliot Reid have a social security number of at least 222222222 and had appointments in examination room B on or before 2008-04-24 11:00 with registered nurse Carla Espinosa?

SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician

JOIN nurse ON appointment.prepnurse = nurse.employeeid
WHERE appointment.end <= '2008-04-24 11:00' AND physician.position = 'Attending Physician' AND nurse.name = 'Carla Espinosa' AND appointment.examinationroom = 'B' AND nurse.registered = 1 AND physician.ssn >= 222222222 AND physician.name = 'Elliot Reid'

JOIN Appointment AS appointment ON physician.EmployeeID = appointment.Physician

records.question: Which physicians had appointments involving nurses that started on or before 2008-04-25 10:00?

JOIN nurse ON appointment.prepnurse = nurse.employeeid
WHERE appointment.start <= '2008-04-25 10:00'

records.question: Who is the Surgical Attending Physician named John Wen, with an SSN of at least 777777777, who heads the Surgery department, has a primary affiliation, underwent a procedure on 2008-05-03, and whose training certifications started on or after 2008-01-01 and expire on or after 2008-12-31?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT physician.employeeid FROM physician
JOIN department ON physician.employeeid = department.head
JOIN affiliated_with ON physician.employeeid = affiliated_with.physician
JOIN trained_in ON physician.employeeid = trained_in.physician
JOIN undergoes ON physician.employeeid = undergoes.physician
WHERE department.name = 'Surgery' AND physician.ssn >= 777777777 AND undergoes.dateundergoes = '2008-05-03' AND trained_in.certificationexpires >= '2008-12-31' AND physician.position = 'Surgical Attending Physician' AND affiliated_with.primaryaffiliation = 1 AND physician.name = 'John Wen' AND trained_in.certificationdate >= '2008-01-01'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.EmployeeID 
FROM Physician p 
JOIN Department d ON p.EmployeeID = d.Head 
JOIN Affiliated_With aw ON p.EmployeeID = aw.Physician 
JOIN Trained_In ti ON p.EmployeeID = ti.Physician 
JOIN Undergoes u ON p.EmployeeID = u.Physician 
WHERE p.Name = 'John Wen' 
  AND p.SSN >= 777777777 
  AND d.Name = 'Surgery' 
  AND aw.PrimaryAffiliation = 1 
  AND u.DateUndergoes = '2008-05-03' 
  AND ti.CertificationDate >= '2008-01-01' 
  AND ti.CertificationExpires >= '2008-12-31'
